functional_requirements.title: Create Order
functional_requirements.description: User creates an order with user ID and item list. Check user existence, product stock, calculate total price, deduct stock, create order record with status pending.

functional_requirements.title: Pay Order
functional_requirements.description: User pays for an order. Check order exists and status is pending, check user balance, deduct balance, update order status to paid.

functional_requirements.title: Ship Order
functional_requirements.description: Ship an order. Check order exists and status is paid, update status to shipped.

functional_requirements.title: Complete Order
functional_requirements.description: Complete an order. Check order exists and status is shipped, update status to completed.

functional_requirements.title: Cancel Order
functional_requirements.description: Cancel an order. Check order exists and status is pending or paid, restore stock, refund balance if paid, update status to cancelled.

functional_requirements.title: List Orders
functional_requirements.description: List orders with optional filters by user and status. Display order details including items, total price, status, and time.

functional_requirements.title: Get User Orders
functional_requirements.description: Get all orders for a specific user. Calculate total spent and count of orders per status.

functional_requirements.title: List Products
functional_requirements.description: List products with info and stock. Optionally filter low stock products.

non_functional_requirements.description: Balance and stock must be consistent across operations (deduct/restore).

acceptance_criteria.description: Create order with valid user and sufficient stock succeeds, stock deducted, order created with pending status.
Create order with insufficient stock returns error, no stock deduction.
Pay order with sufficient balance succeeds, balance deducted, status changed to paid.
Pay order with insufficient balance returns error, no balance deduction.
Cancel pending order restores stock, no refund, status cancelled.
Cancel paid order restores stock and refunds balance, status cancelled.
Order status transitions correctly: pending -> paid -> shipped -> completed.

storage.details: Three independent in-memory data sources: users, products, orders.

glossary.order: A record of a purchase transaction containing user, items, total price, status, and creation time.
glossary.pending: Initial order status after creation, awaiting payment.
glossary.completed: Final order status after delivery confirmation.
glossary.cancelled: Order status after cancellation, with possible refund and stock restoration.

input_spec.description: Input is a JSON object with command and order_data fields. The function manage_order(command, order_data) is called.

schema.command: string (one of: create_order, pay_order, ship_order, complete_order, cancel_order, list_orders, get_user_orders, list_products)
schema.order_data: object containing relevant fields: user_id (int), order_id (int), items (list of {product_id, quantity}), status_filter (string), user_filter (int), low_stock (bool)

output_spec.description: Output is a JSON object with success, message, and data fields.
